name: Apex Development Public Company Limited
summary: Apex Development Public Company Limited develops and sells real estate properties. The company develops residential condominiums, villas, and hotels, as well as land. It also provides services for customers to operate apartments and villas for rent. The company was formerly known as Sun Tech Group Public Company Limited and changed its name to Apex Development Public Company Limited in August 2007. Apex Development Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1989 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
